name: Conrad Bali
address: Jalan Pratama 168, Nusa Dua, Bali, Indonesia
description:
Khám Phá Sự Sang Trọng Tại Conrad Bali - Thiên Đường Nghỉ Dưỡng Trên Đảo Bali

Nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Bali chỉ khoảng 10 km và chỉ mất khoảng 25 phút lái xe để đến sân bay quốc tế, Conrad Bali là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những du khách muốn tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp trong lòng thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp của Indonesia. Khách sạn được xây dựng vào năm 2004 và đã trải qua cuộc nâng cấp lớn vào năm 2018, mang đến sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa phong cách hiện đại và tiện nghi sang trọng.

Với chính sách linh hoạt dành cho trẻ em, Conrad Bali cho phép trẻ từ 6 đến 11 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có chuyến đi cùng con nhỏ. Khách sạn mở cửa từ 3 giờ chiều để check-in và kết thúc dịch vụ vào lúc 12 giờ trưa ngày hôm sau, đảm bảo sự thuận tiện tối đa cho khách lưu trú. Với nhiều loại phòng đa dạng và dịch vụ đẳng cấp, Conrad Bali cam kết mang đến cho bạn một kỳ nghỉ khó quên trên hòn đảo xinh đẹp này.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp Tại Conrad Bali

Tại Conrad Bali, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm một loạt các tiện nghi giải trí cao cấp nhằm mang lại sự thư thái và thoải mái tối đa trong kỳ nghỉ của mình. Hãy thư giãn tại các phòng xông hơi, phòng xông hơi ướt và hồ tắm nóng (hot tub) để xua tan mệt mỏi sau những ngày dài khám phá đảo Bali xinh đẹp. Ngoài ra, spa của khách sạn còn cung cấp các dịch vụ massage chuyên nghiệp, giúp bạn lấy lại năng lượng và tinh thần sảng khoái. Đặc biệt, quầy bar sang trọng của khách sạn là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức những ly cocktail độc đáo trong không gian sang trọng, phù hợp để thư giãn hoặc gặp gỡ bạn bè.

Ngoài các tiện nghi chăm sóc sức khỏe và giải trí, Conrad Bali còn sở hữu cửa hàng quà lưu niệm đặc sắc, nơi du khách có thể chọn lựa những món quà ý nghĩa làm kỷ niệm hoặc tặng người thân. Với sự kết hợp hài hòa giữa các dịch vụ thư giãn, giải trí và mua sắm, Conrad Bali cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm tuyệt vời, giúp du khách có những khoảnh khắc thư giãn và đáng nhớ trong hành trình khám phá Bali.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Đẳng Cấp Tại Conrad Bali

Tại Conrad Bali, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm các tiện nghi thể thao hiện đại và đa dạng để duy trì phong cách sống năng động trong kỳ nghỉ của mình. Trung tâm thể hình miễn phí mở cửa 24 giờ mang lại sự linh hoạt tối đa cho những ai yêu thích tập luyện, giúp bạn giữ vững phong độ bất kể thời gian nào trong ngày. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể thưởng thức các hoạt động ngoài trời như tennis trên sân cỏ chuyên nghiệp, hoặc thư giãn bên hồ bơi ngoài trời rộng lớn, nơi lý tưởng để tắm nắng và thư giãn sau những giờ phút vận động sôi động.

Không chỉ dừng lại ở đó, khu vực hồ bơi còn có quầy bar bên hồ, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống mát lạnh và cocktail trong không gian thoáng đãng, phù hợp để giao lưu và thư giãn cùng bạn bè hoặc người thân. Với bãi biển riêng tuyệt đẹp ngay sát cạnh, Conrad Bali mang đến cho du khách trải nghiệm thể thao và nghỉ dưỡng trọn vẹn, hòa quyện giữa thiên nhiên tươi đẹp và các tiện ích đẳng cấp.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Ích Tại Conrad Bali

Tại Conrad Bali, khách hàng sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ tiện ích đa dạng và tiện lợi để đảm bảo kỳ nghỉ của bạn thật hoàn hảo. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp bạn dễ dàng đặt món ăn hoặc yêu cầu dịch vụ bất cứ lúc nào trong ngày. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ giặt là nhanh chóng, tiện lợi giúp bạn luôn giữ gìn trang phục sạch sẽ và tươm tất trong suốt hành trình. Đặc biệt, các phòng nghỉ đều có Wi-Fi miễn phí, giúp khách dễ dàng liên lạc và cập nhật thông tin mọi lúc mọi nơi.

Bên cạnh đó, Conrad Bali còn trang bị các tiện ích an toàn như két an toàn trong phòng, dịch vụ giữ hành lý, và dịch vụ concierge tận tâm để hỗ trợ khách trong việc đặt tour, xe đưa đón hay các yêu cầu đặc biệt khác. Khách còn có thể truy cập vào phòng chờ doanh nhân cao cấp, nơi cung cấp không gian yên tĩnh, sang trọng để làm việc hoặc thư giãn. Với các dịch vụ tiện ích này, Conrad Bali cam kết mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái, an toàn và tiện lợi nhất cho mọi khách hàng.

Tiện Nghi Về Giao Thông Tại Conrad Bali

Tại Conrad Bali, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ vận chuyển tiện lợi và linh hoạt để khám phá vẻ đẹp của Bali. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ tour đa dạng, giúp bạn dễ dàng khám phá các điểm đến nổi bật quanh khu vực. Đặc biệt, hệ thống valet parking chuyên nghiệp cùng bãi đỗ xe rộng rãi ngay trong khuôn viên giúp bạn yên tâm về phương tiện của mình. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ shuttle miễn phí đưa đón khách đến các địa điểm quan trọng, mang lại sự thuận tiện tối đa trong hành trình khám phá Bali của bạn. Với các tiện ích này, Conrad Bali cam kết mang lại trải nghiệm du lịch thoải mái, dễ dàng từ lúc đặt chân đến khi rời khỏi đảo ngọc xinh đẹp này.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Conrad Bali - Lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho kỳ nghỉ tại Bali

Tọa lạc tại Bali, Indonesia, Conrad Bali là một khu nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng và đẳng cấp với những tiện nghi phòng đẳng cấp. Các phòng nghỉ tại đây được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi như điều hòa không khí, áo choàng tắm, báo hàng ngày, phim trong phòng, máy sấy tóc, truyền hình và tủ lạnh mini. 

Không chỉ vậy, mỗi phòng còn có ban công/hiên nhà và truyền hình vệ tinh/cáp TV để bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian riêng tư. Ngoài ra, tại Conrad Bali, bạn còn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phòng hàng ngày và tận hưởng các đồ uống từ minibar trong phòng. Với những tiện nghi phòng tuyệt vời như vậy, Conrad Bali sẽ là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Bali.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại Conrad Bali

Tại Conrad Bali, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ ẩm thực đa dạng và tiện nghi hàng đầu. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp bạn thưởng thức các món ăn yêu thích mọi lúc trong không gian riêng tư của mình. Nhà hàng tại đây phục vụ các món ăn tinh tế, phong phú, phù hợp với khẩu vị của mọi du khách, từ ẩm thực địa phương đến quốc tế. Ngoài ra, buffet sáng hàng ngày mang đến một trải nghiệm ẩm thực phong phú và hấp dẫn, giúp bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng. Với dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, Conrad Bali cam kết mang đến sự sạch sẽ và thoải mái tối đa cho khách hàng trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Các loại phòng đa dạng tại Conrad Bali mang đến trải nghiệm đẳng cấp

Tại Conrad Bali, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng từ các suite sang trọng đến các phòng tiêu chuẩn phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu nghỉ dưỡng. Các loại phòng như Conrad Suite King và Conrad Suite Twin rộng rãi lên tới 110 mét vuông, mang đến không gian thoải mái và tiện nghi cho cặp đôi hoặc gia đình nhỏ. Đối với những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian riêng tư bên bãi biển, King Lagoon Access Suite và Deluxe King Ocean Front là những lựa chọn lý tưởng, mang lại trải nghiệm đắm chìm trong vẻ đẹp của thiên nhiên Bali.

Ngoài ra, những ai tìm kiếm sự sang trọng và đẳng cấp có thể chọn Conrad Penthouse rộng tới 340 mét vuông hoặc Conrad Pool Villa với diện tích 235 mét vuông, mang lại sự riêng tư tối đa và không gian sống đẳng cấp. Các loại phòng khác như Deluxe Twin Garden View hay Deluxe King Resort Room cũng mang đến sự tiện nghi và thoải mái cho mọi khách hàng. Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng và không gặp rắc rối, giúp chuyến đi của bạn trở nên hoàn hảo hơn bao giờ hết.

Khám phá vùng Nusa Dua tại Bali, Indonesia

Với vị trí tuyệt đẹp tại bờ biển phía nam của Bali, vùng Nusa Dua là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Với khí hậu nhiệt đới ấm áp quanh năm, khách sạn Conrad Bali tọa lạc ngay bên bờ biển, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm thực sự tuyệt vời.

Với bãi biển tuyệt đẹp và nước biển trong xanh, du khách có thể thả mình trong làn nước dịu mát hoặc tham gia các hoạt động thể thao nước như lướt ván, lặn biển và điều khiển thuyền buồm. Ngoài ra, vùng Nusa Dua cũng nổi tiếng với các sân golf chất lượng cao và những khu vườn nhiệt đới tuyệt đẹp.

Với vị trí thuận lợi, du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng như Đảo Penyu, Bảo tàng Bali và Đền Uluwatu. Với một loạt các nhà hàng, quán bar và cửa hàng mua sắm, du khách cũng có thể tận hưởng văn hóa và ẩm thực độc đáo của Bali. Với vẻ đẹp tự nhiên tuyệt vời và sự tiện nghi của khách sạn Conrad Bali, du khách sẽ có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại vùng Nusa Dua.

Hướng dẫn di chuyển từ sân bay đến Conrad Bali, Nusa Dua

Conrad Bali là một kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng nằm ở Nusa Dua, Bali, Indonesia. Để đến được Conrad Bali từ sân bay gần nhất, bạn có một số lựa chọn vận chuyển thuận tiện và dễ dàng.

Một lựa chọn phổ biến là sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Tại sân bay Ngurah Rai, bạn có thể tìm thấy nhiều hãng taxi chính hãng. Hãy đảm bảo rằng bạn lựa chọn một hãng taxi đáng tin cậy và sử dụng bảng giá cố định để tránh bị tính phí quá mức. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay đến Conrad Bali khoảng 25-30 phút, tùy thuộc vào lưu lượng giao thông.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể thuê xe tự lái để tự mình di chuyển từ sân bay đến Conrad Bali. Tại sân bay Ngurah Rai, có nhiều công ty cho thuê xe có mặt. Hãy đảm bảo rằng bạn có bằng lái xe quốc tế và biết cách điều khiển xe an toàn trên đường Bali. Điều này sẽ cho phép bạn thoải mái khám phá đảo Bali trong thời gian lưu trú của mình.

Cuối cùng, nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm phong cách Bali truyền thống, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe hơi hoặc xe hơi ngựa. Đây là cách di chuyển độc đáo và thú vị để đến Conrad Bali từ sân bay. Bạn có thể thưởng thức cảnh quan đẹp và cảm nhận không khí yên bình của đảo Bali trong suốt hành trình. Dù bạn chọn phương tiện nào, hãy chắc chắn rằng bạn đã đặt sự thoải mái và tiện nghi của mình lên hàng đầu khi đến Conrad Bali.

Khám phá các điểm tham quan xung quanh Conrad Bali

Conrad Bali tọa lạc gần một số điểm tham quan nổi tiếng tại Bali, Indonesia. Bãi biển Nusa Dua là một trong những điểm đến hàng đầu, với cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh. Du khách có thể tắm nắng, tắm biển hoặc tham gia các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước tại đây.

Một điểm tham quan khác gần đó là Turtle Island, nơi du khách có thể đến gần với loài rùa biển và thậm chí còn có cơ hội tham gia vào các hoạt động bảo tồn và nuôi dưỡng rùa. Đảo này cũng nổi tiếng với các hoạt động lặn biển và snorkeling, cho phép du khách khám phá vẻ đẹp đáy biển Bali.

Ngoài ra, Conrad Bali cũng gần với Balinese feature pool, Tanjung Benoa và Bãi biển Benoa, nơi du khách có thể tham gia vào các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước như lướt ván buồm, lướt sóng và lặn biển. Các điểm tham quan khác bao gồm Thể thao dưới nước Tanjung Benoa, IJ Grosir, Club Med Bali Beach, Monument Veteran và PADI Hammerhead Bali Dive.

Nhà hàng xung quanh Conrad Bali

Conrad Bali nằm gần một số nhà hàng nổi tiếng như Warung Babi Guling Sari Dewi Bp. Dobil, Warung Laota, Sama Sama Yakiniku Japanese Restaurant Nusa Dua, Queens of India Indian Restaurant in Bali, Luna Bonita, The Ritz-Carlton Lounge & Bar, 2 Day Cafe, Soleil, Edogin và Nelayan Seafood Restaurant. Bạn có thể dễ dàng tìm thấy những món ăn ngon và đa dạng từ các nhà hàng này, từ ẩm thực Bali truyền thống đến các món ăn quốc tế hấp dẫn. Hãy thưởng thức những món ăn tuyệt vời và trải nghiệm văn hóa ẩm thực độc đáo của Bali tại Conrad Bali.

Khám phá khu mua sắm xung quanh Conrad Bali

Conrad Bali nằm gần nhiều khu mua sắm nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm mua sắm độc đáo. Tại Bali Collection, du khách có thể tìm thấy một loạt các cửa hàng thời trang như At the Corner, Balisurf, Ayu và Lacoste. Với sự đa dạng về sản phẩm và phong cách, du khách sẽ tìm thấy những món đồ thời trang phù hợp với gu thẩm mỹ của mình. Ngoài ra, Eling là một cửa hàng nổi tiếng với các sản phẩm trang sức độc đáo và đẹp mắt. Du khách có thể tham quan và mua sắm những món đồ để làm quà lưu niệm. Với sự thuận tiện của việc có các khu mua sắm gần đó, Conrad Bali là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích mua sắm và khám phá văn hóa Bali.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Conrad Bali so sánh với giá phòng trung bình tại cùng thành phố

Conrad Bali là một khách sạn sang trọng tọa lạc tại Bali, Indonesia. Với giá phòng trung bình là $224, Conrad Bali cung cấp cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với dịch vụ và tiện nghi cao cấp. So với giá phòng trung bình tại cùng thành phố là $199, Conrad Bali đem lại sự sang trọng và đẳng cấp hơn cho khách hàng. Với nhiều tiện ích như hồ bơi, nhà hàng, spa và trung tâm thể dục, khách sạn này đáng để bạn trải nghiệm khi đến Bali.

Cảnh quan đẹp, dịch vụ tuyệt vời tại Conrad Bali

Conrad Bali là một khách sạn đáng để khám phá và trải nghiệm. Với cảnh quan đẹp, phòng ốc sạch sẽ và tiện nghi tuyệt vời, khách sạn này thực sự đáng để ghé thăm. Bể bơi lớn và sáng sủa, cùng với bữa sáng ngon lành, tạo nên một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ cho du khách. Khách sạn này được khuyến nghị bởi không gian tuyệt vời, bãi biển tuyệt đẹp và những nhân viên thân thiện và chuyên nghiệp. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng chấp nhận nuôi thú cưng, là một điểm cộng lớn cho những ai muốn du lịch cùng với thú cưng của mình. Tất cả những điều này tạo nên một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời cho du khách.

Đánh giá khách hàng tuyệt vời về Conrad Bali

Conrad Bali là một khách sạn đẳng cấp tại Bali, Indonesia và nhận được những đánh giá tuyệt vời từ khách hàng. Với điểm tổng thể 8.8, khách sạn này đáng chú ý với chất lượng dịch vụ và tiện nghi tốt. Khách hàng đánh giá khá cao về giá trị của khách sạn, với điểm 8.5. Điều này cho thấy Conrad Bali đáng giá với mức giá mà khách hàng trả. 

Khách sạn này cũng được đánh giá cao về cơ sở vật chất với điểm 9.0. Với các tiện ích hiện đại và đa dạng như hồ bơi, trung tâm thể dục và spa, Conrad Bali đảm bảo mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm thú vị và thư giãn. Điểm 8.0 cho thực phẩm và ẩm thực cũng là một điểm nổi bật, cho thấy khách sạn này cung cấp các món ăn ngon và đa dạng. 

Ngoài ra, Conrad Bali còn nhận được điểm cao cho vệ sinh (9.0), vị trí (8.6), sự thoải mái (8.6) và hiệu suất của nhân viên (9.1). Với môi trường sạch sẽ và thoải mái, khách sạn này đảm bảo mang đến cho khách hàng một kỳ nghỉ thú vị và thoải mái. Đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp và thân thiện sẽ đảm bảo rằng mọi yêu cầu và mong muốn của khách hàng được đáp ứng một cách tốt nhất. 

Với những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng, Conrad Bali là sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Bali, Indonesia.

sample_comments.text:
Mặc dù đã lâu nhưng thực sự được quản lý rất tốt~ 
Thức ăn cũng rất ngon và tiện nghi, bữa sáng thật sự tốt nhất. Tôi đã yêu cầu thêm đệm vì chiếc đệm quá cứng và ngay lập tức họ đã đặt topper cho tôi~ Bữa sáng có thể ăn buffet hoặc gọi món, và món gọi rất ngon~ Cà phê cũng ngon và mọi thứ ở khách sạn này đều rất thoải mái~ Tôi đã dùng vòi sen mới mà màu gần như không thay đổi, nước cũng rất sạch sẽ~ 
Hoàn toàn khuyến nghị cho các gia đình du lịch ở khu vực Nusa Dua~
sample_comments.title: Một nơi ở vô cùng thoải mái
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for sharing such a thoughtful review! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed our well-maintained facilities, delicious food, and top-notch amenities. It's great to know our team could quickly assist with a softer mattress topper to make your stay more comfortable. We're glad you loved the breakfast options and coffee as well.
We truly appreciate your recommendation and would be honored to welcome you and your family back in the near future.
Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

sample_comments.title: Fantastic stay.
sample_comments.positives: Great facilities and excellent service.

sample_comments.text: Trước khi đi, tôi luôn lo lắng rằng khách sạn quá cũ, sẽ có mùi. Tuy nhiên khi nhận phòng, tôi nhận ra sự lo lắng là thừa thãi. Không có mùi ẩm mốc, cũng không quá ẩm, thỉnh thoảng có một chút mùi khó chịu từ cống rãnh nhưng vẫn chấp nhận được. Thủ tục nhận phòng có nhân viên tiếp tân nói tiếng Trung, việc giao tiếp không gặp bất kỳ trở ngại nào. Tôi khuyên nên ở tầng cao có view biển, buổi sáng có thể ngắm bình minh từ ban công. Đồ uống chào đón rất ngon, nhưng cơm ở nhà hàng thì bình thường, không khó ăn nhưng cũng không ngon. Cảnh quan khách sạn rất đẹp, đặc biệt là bầu trời đầy sao ở sảnh vào buổi tối trong chương trình Ngày An Ninh Indonesia rất đẹp.
sample_comments.title: Hơn cả mong đợi, tỷ lệ giá cả và chất lượng khá tốt.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for sharing your experience. We are pleased to hear that your stay exceeded expectations. It is wonderful that our Chinese-speaking receptionist assisted in making your check-in smooth, and that you enjoyed the high-floor sea view and sunrise from your balcony.
We appreciate your feedback on the welcome drink and restaurant offerings and will share your comments with our culinary team for improvement. 
Thank you again for your review. We look forward to welcoming you back for an even more enjoyable stay.
Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

sample_comments.title: Incredible!!
sample_comments.positives: From the moment we arrived we were in ore of this place and the beautiful staff. The whole property was stunning from the gardens to the pools and the rooms. It was always clean and the staff go above and beyond to help you in any way possible. All of the staff throughout the whole hotel where so lovely but I would love to mention one gorgeous girl named Wiranti who works in the Suku restaurant at breakfast time. Her smile always lit up the room and every morning and took the time to talk to us and recommend places to go. She could not be any more helpful and was such a sweetheart. We will be back to this incredible place!!

sample_comments.text:
Nơi đây mang đến không khí tinh tế mà chỉ có những khu nghỉ dưỡng cao cấp mới có, trong khi đó, sự phục vụ của nhân viên lại rất ấm áp, khiến bạn cảm thấy như đang ở nhà, tạo nên cảm giác "thoải mái" đáng ấn tượng. 
Trong khuôn viên và các phòng đều sạch sẽ và đẹp đẽ, không gian sang trọng được trải dài khắp nơi. Dù vậy, không có sự gò bó, nhờ vào sự quan tâm tinh tế của nhân viên và nụ cười thân thiện, bạn có thể tận hưởng thời gian một cách tự nhiên. 
Điều khiến tôi ấn tượng nhất là chất lượng dịch vụ ở đây rất cao. Họ luôn đáp ứng một cách chu đáo ngay cả với những yêu cầu nhỏ nhất, khiến tôi muốn nghĩ rằng "mình muốn trở lại đây một lần nữa". 
Đây là một khu nghỉ dưỡng rất cân bằng, vừa có sự sang trọng vừa tạo cảm giác thoải mái. Không chỉ là một chuyến đi đặc biệt, mà cũng rất phù hợp cho những ai muốn thư giãn và tái tạo năng lượng.
sample_comments.title: cao nhất
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for your exceptional feedback. We are truly honored to know your stay reflected both refined luxury and a genuine sense of comfort.
Your kind recognition of our team's attentive service and warm hospitality means a great deal to us. It is especially rewarding to hear that the balance of elegance and relaxed atmosphere made your experience so memorable.
We look forward to welcoming you back for another enriching and restorative stay.
Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

sample_comments.title: Perfect
sample_comments.positives: I liked everything. The staff made us feel cozy and provided the best customer service possible.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing really.

sample_comments.text: Việc nâng cấp lên Conrad Suites đã giúp tôi ở trong một phòng rộng 110m2, thật sự rất thoải mái. Tôi đã lên kế hoạch đi tham quan nhiều nơi nhưng cuối cùng vẫn dành nhiều thời gian bên hồ bơi vì nó mở cửa từ 6 giờ sáng đến 10 giờ tối. Biển trước mặt không được đẹp như tôi mong đợi nhưng tôi nghĩ đi dạo là đủ. Nhân viên ở đây đều rất thân thiện. Tuy nhiên, việc thiếu máy sấy tóc và ấm đun nước trong phòng là một điểm trừ nhỏ.
sample_comments.title: Đây là một trải nghiệm lưu trú tuyệt vời.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for your wonderful review. We're delighted you enjoyed the spacious room, and the relaxing pool atmosphere and that our team made you feel well cared for. We appreciate your feedback regarding the beach and in-room amenities, which has been shared with the team, and we hope to welcome you back for another memorable stay.
Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Deluxe Resort có 2 giường đơn

sample_comments.title: Fantastic short stay - Outstanding personalized service
sample_comments.positives:
We only stayed two nights at Conrad Bali but felt like VIPs the entire time. The hotel is beautiful, but what really made the difference was the people.
Our curator Cicilia was incredible - she went the extra mile for every request and made sure everything was perfect for us. Her dedication really stood out.
We enjoyed a romantic dinner right on the beach, and our server Chandra made the evening truly special. He was so attentive and enthusiastic that he turned a great dinner into an unforgettable experience.
We also received a complimentary photo session with Arman, who is not only a very talented photographer but also super fun to work with. He captured some amazing shots that we'll treasure.
Everything about the stay felt luxurious yet warm and personal. We highly recommend Conrad Bali and would return in a heartbeat. A big thank you to Cicilia, Chandra, and Arman for making our visit so special!

sample_comments.text:
Tất cả mọi thứ đều hoàn hảo và tuyệt vời. Mặc dù là phòng nhỏ nhất, nhưng vẫn đủ. Vì không ở phía hồ bơi nên rất yên tĩnh. Bữa sáng và bữa tối đều rất ngon. Bữa sáng có thể có những nơi đông đúc và những nơi yên tĩnh tùy theo địa điểm. Tôi nghĩ các gia đình nên chọn những nơi đông đúc. Có vẻ như có nhiều loại đồ ăn cho trẻ em. Bữa tối theo phong cách BBQ được tổ chức vào thứ Năm thực sự rất tuyệt. Đó là bữa tối cuối cùng nhưng tôi nghĩ đây là bữa ngon nhất. Bạn không nên đi thử món Nhật. 

Con khỉ bằng bông rất dễ thương. Tôi đã mua thêm một cái. Tôi nghĩ là giá đã tăng lên một chút so với trước đây. 

Dù sao thì tôi cũng khuyên đây là điểm đến tuyệt vời cho tuần trăng mật hoặc các cặp đôi.
sample_comments.title: Chúng tôi đã sử dụng cho chuyến trăng mật.
sample_comments.response:

It is wonderful to hear that you appreciated the quality of our service, the peaceful atmosphere, and the variety of dining experiences. Your feedback regarding the Japanese restaurant is noted and will be shared with our culinary team. We look forward to welcoming you again in the future.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Bad hotel management and unacceptable room cleanne
sample_comments.text: during 4 days and 3 nights I stayed at Conrad Bali, i transferred to 3 different rooms. I first sufferred over 30 bedbugs over night on my first night there, transferred to a second room, woken up with no AC in the morning and with no phones to report because they were broken. Finally transferred to the third room, our phones have been broken again, we were unreachable by outside guests through phone. Conrad Bali's clinic doctor is extreamly professional and the I would not personally accept her medical advices. The management had treated my bedbugs situation very lightly and even until the condition continued to worsen, management still decided to treat it lightly and avoid any meeting with the guests. It is quite a kids friendly resort but due to the room cleanness, i strongly urge guests with kids to not stay there should bedbugs situation reoccure again. Conditions as such can be worser for young kids and babies. I was more than happy to leave after it's my last day with the hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Kids friendly resort

sample_comments.title: Will not come back.
sample_comments.text:
Spent 2 nights here, I had a rather bad or unlucky experience here. I came here to get a quiet, and peaceful resort experience. Certainly didn't get that and certainly will not come back.

- This is a big hotel, after check in, nobody even showed me to my room. I was given room keys, and i had to ask around how to get there.

- Room: the room has this pretty colorful rug around the bed, i stepped on it, my feet suddenly got all sticky. I guess the housekeeping doesnt even vacuum the rug or clean it whatsoever

- Cleaning: the next day, i went down to the pool obviously expecting the room to be cleaned when I'm gone. I came back to an uncleaned room. Texted receptionist through Whatsapp (because they won't answer your call from the phone in your room), it took 2 complains and 2 different people to answer (each time you ask through Whatsapp, different people answer your question) and well over an hour for them to come. I don't see them bringing anything to clean the rug with. Even after being requested to clean the rug, its still sticky.

- Customer Service:
They only answer through Whatsapp, doesn't pick up phone calls through room phone. Those phones are only used for them to call you. I find this quite annoying. 
Problem was: i came back to my room seeing it still uncleaned, i bought food from outside i was hungry, i wanted plates & cutleries and i want mineral waters. So i went and ask them through whatsapp for 1. Plates and cutleries 2. Mineral waters 3. Housekeeping to clean room. I think the customer service can only process one thing at a time as i had to keep asking and asking and asking. 
- It took 40 mins for the plates to arrive
- Asked the guy who brought the plate to bring mineral water - took around 50 mins to get it
- cleaning service took well over an hour to come. Just after i finished my meals.

- The Room Sensors! (WORST THING EVER!!!)
They have this sensor, so when the door opens, the aircon shut down and when theres no movement in the room aircon
sample_comments.response:
Dear Elisa,
I am terribly sorry your experience with us occurred as you described. Clearly these incidents are not to our standard and we must review and take quick action to rectify with our team on all aspects that you have raised. Please accept our sincere apologies that your stay did not go as we have anticipated for you and that we hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Bad
sample_comments.text:
We had bad experience with this hotel....dirty and the property has low maintenance!
The best staff are in the breakfast area Pa Putu and Ibu Manik they are very professional.

The cleaning service was very unclean they don't care to replace what we need daily, they clean the floor was very smelly.

Everyday we need to asked them to the towel and etc.

I think they need to train the staff better, we won't comeback and never recommend this hotel.

Supposed concert hotel is level up from Hilton, but we don't think so.
sample_comments.response:

We hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back with us again when you are next in Bali for what we are confident will be a much better stay experience.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Its just 'ok' hotel, nothing special. The room is outdated. Not 5 stars hotel
sample_comments.text: The big thing. Front desk and most of the employees seem stressed out. We didnt feel their enthusiasm when met us. Room is outdated which is fine if maintained properly but they are not. Food is expensive. We continued our stay at The Laguna Nusa Dua. Much different experience. I would go back to the Laguna but not at Conrad. The guests were loud screaming still after past 12 midnight (maybe drunk). We told the front desk at checkedout. No apologies were offered, but excuses. They told 'oh we have wedding last night and usually are loud'. Just like that. It just 'ok' hotel. Quite dissapointed and didnt meet my expectation and def not lived up to the name. Nothing special and prefer elsewhere. The management need to learn from the Laguna Nusa Dua.

sample_comments.title: Nice beachfront, but high cost unjustified.
sample_comments.text: Nothing to write home about. Rooms average for area, breakfast not included at 250 usd/night. Similar quality hotels can be had for 100 usd less in same area.
sample_comments.positives: Beachfront with sandy pool great.

sample_comments.title: Pretentious and just not worth the money
sample_comments.text:
The location is as pretentious and boring as the hotel.
One of the 3 in-house restos was closed for renovation. The other two offer little value for extortionally high prices.
The rooms are standard (nothing that would blow you out of the water). The view from the (standard) rooms is virtually non-existent (don't know about the higher category rooms).
The place is pretty empty (as to be expected) and the few guests looked just as bored as I was. Only redeeming feature are the water sport rental huts just in front of the hotel beach. Yet again, that fun could have been had for a lot less money.

sample_comments.title: Honestly not so value for money
sample_comments.text:
Old hotel, nothing impressive. Some of their staff was trying their best but with the price that I paid, we really weren't impressed at all. The room, I believed was renovated and not too bad but you can imagine the hotel age by looking at their old fashioned shower head. Tv resolution really need a redo, cannot even see the name of the hotel on the tv clearly, you can just imagine. 

The beach is so disappointing. Its the worst I can imagine for Nusa Dua. We went out to Nusa Dua Beach and Pantai Mengiat and they are both so much better. The beachfront is not enjoyable by the kids, and it's looks like a coarse sandy field rather than a beach . Left with no choice we went there to play sand and the guard said the beach is unsafe and asked us to wear slippers . I immediately brought my kids back to the hotel. The hotel is located at the upper North of Nusa Dua and very misleading to named it a Nusa Dua Hotel. 

Breakfast was so so, and one morning we actually need to que to go in. 5-star? No no. I felt we can get a better hotel in my home country and we don't need to travel to Bali for this kind of quality and experience.

Honestly, if they are charging half the price maybe still a hotel choice for some. For me, even if it's a half pice we would not want to stay in, we travelled to Bali for an exotic experience. It's our 2nd hotel in Bali and our 1st hotel was so much better in all aspects.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jerry,
Please accept our apologies your recent stay did not meet with your expectations. 
To be clear the resort is indeed located in Nusa Dua, not to be confused with the ITDC complex. I am sorry you felt the beach which is to be cleaned twice a day did not meet with your expectations; water shoes are now available to assist in preventing any issues with sea urchins or similar sea life while allowing guests to discover and enjoy the natural beauty of the beach and all it has to offer on low tide.
We are sorry you felt in the end you could have stayed at home and will be following up with our team to ensure we connect with all guests to ensure a personalized, genuine stay experience in the future.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Disappointing. Severely needs upgrading
sample_comments.text: Disappointing. Probably the worst experience in a 5 star hotel in Bali. The hotel tries to market itself as luxury, but lacks the quality to be such. The rooms were old and run down. There was a cockroach in the room when we woke up. The breakfast offering was so-so. The snacks and fruits ordered from the pool were sub-par. The upside is the pool, which is suitable for families. The service was fine, and tried to help make us feel better given our poor experience hence adding a star.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Johnny Chen,
Please accept our most sincere apologies that we fell so short in terms of service and experience during your recent stay. Trust that your comments have tremendous impact and that we are actioning immediately with our team to rectify accordingly. We hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back to enjoy as so many others have when you are next in Bali; I am confident we can make it right.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Under my expectation for 5 star hotel
sample_comments.text:
Conrad
This is my first time to Conrad. But sadly it's under my expectation.
First, I arrive at 14:50 and have to wait another 10minutes because the check in time is at 15:00. But after 15:00, I only got 1 room readt but not for the another room. We insist that the two room has to be ready. But the Reseptionist seems confused and go inside the backdoor and I wait for almost 15minutes but the room still not ready. No welcome drink serve until we asked.
After struggling wait, the 2nd room ready on about 16:15. But once again, we are sad. The pillow sheet is smelly, as if it is not change after use of previous guest or some kind of musty smell. The smells is strong so that wes cannot sleep. We try to spray it with our sanitizer but the smell stayed. So I have to cover the pillow with clean towels. The bedsheet also have stain. Some of bath amenities is dusty as if never replaced when it is not used by previous guest. And when we ask for ice cube, it took us asking for more than three times for it to arrived.
The corridor has no direction sign, at day one we always get lost to lobby or to pool or back to our room.
1st night, we found a cat eating on our plate outside. And the 2nd night we found that cat urinate in front of our room and took almost 1 hour for housekeeping to clean it up.

sample_comments.title: Miserable Holiday
sample_comments.text:
Disclaimer :
This is my personal experience. No intention to make bad image of the property. But as valuable feedback for improvement and as insight for readers' consideration as they made their own choices. I am not responsible for what others decide.

Reservation :
Chaotic from the beginning. We moved from other 5 stars in Uluwatu after long day of event and all I wanted was to take some rest, get pampered in 5 stars services.
Book king bed because we have toddler sleeping together with us. As we got in to the room, we were given a twin bed. We checked in at 5pm, and we only get to the right room after 7pm! The lady in reception heartfeltlessly said "it is crowded time". How do you expect a hotel to be, are you sure you want it as quiet as in pandemic?
We were exhausted, late to dinner. And i ended up getting sick during the whole stay.

Housekeeping :
We waited until 7 pm to get the room ready. Which was already far away from the check out/check in time. 2 hrs waiting, expecting it to be squeeky clean. But no. Stains were EVERYWHERE, in the comforter, towels, and even in the walls, i got a hand print of kid, which certainly not mine, because mine was not that tall. Broken shower with sharp end. Both toothbruses were already opened, and lost their tooth paste. I guess housekeeping didnt even mind checking it during clean up and just gave us the used one. Smelly bathrobe..

But i was too exhausted and too sick to let anyone in to the room and fix the chaos.

Hospitality
I would say it was below my expectation for 5 stars. They didnt even follow up the issues and approach me until my 3rd day out of my 4 days of staying.

What they did was only : Offering 1 fresh coconut and a spa voucher, that i could use in limited slot within 24hrs before my check out time - which end up impossible to take. Thank you, but to me that didnt feel like a sincere gesture. They didnt even bother to check if i had enough water in the room when I got high fever - a small gesture I will appreciate more than a late response.

During check out, i met the same lady who did the chaotic check in. She acted like nothing's wrong, being rather cold. Not even say any apology. Sorry, but that's far below indonesian hospitality standard, i'd say.

Highlight of the stay :
Complimentary photo from digiphoto. Mr. Tegar was superb dan very helpful. I did push myself to take this opportunity once I got a bit better on 3rd day, because it might be the only thing left of the holiday. Not in a good health, not in a good mood.

Conclusion :
To me, money comes around. But not the valuable time with my family that we rarely have. So to me personally, for the sake of my precious time with my family, I would rather find another 5 stars who kept their standard of personalized services and hospitality. Lots of options nowadays in Bali.

sample_comments.title: Mixed Feelings: A Beautiful Brand Falling Short of Luxury Standards.
sample_comments.text:
We chose Conrad Bali to celebrate my wife's birthday, expecting the high-end luxury experience that the Hilton brand usually promises. 

Unfortunately, our 3-day stay left us with incredibly mixed feelings. While the human element of the resort shines brightly, the hardware, attention to detail, and overall value fell significantly short of a 5-star standard.

Here is the breakdown of our experience:
1. Hospitality & Staff (The Bright Spot)
The staff at Conrad Bali are the resort's greatest asset. Across the board, we were met with warm smiles, polite greetings, and genuine hospitality. They made a wonderful effort for my wife's birthday, ensuring she felt celebrated and accommodated throughout our stay.
However, we did notice a strange inconsistency at the front gates. We chose to get around Bali on a motorbike. Every time we returned, the security's welcoming gestures varied wildly. Some guards were incredibly welcoming, while others treated us with a cold, dismissive attitude---leaving us with the uncomfortable impression that guests arriving on bikes are looked down upon as "low class" or vendors. True luxury should mean impeccable service regardless of how a guest chooses to travel.

2. The Room: Confusing Layout & Cheap Amenities
The room layout left us scratching our heads.
- Awkward Furnishings: There was no sofa and only a single chair provided inside the room. This meant my wife and I could never sit at the table together to eat or relax. One of us always had to sit on the bed---which is frustrating when you've just come back from a long day outside and aren't ready to get into bed yet.
- Housekeeping Oversight: Upon checking in, a staff member was in our room setting up a birthday cake, and another knocked five minutes later to set up the Yukata. While we appreciated the hustle, we quickly discovered dirty, used floor mats from the previous guest. A luxury resort should have a strict supervisor checklist before handing keys over to Front Office.
- Disappointing Amenities: The room amenities were shockingly basic and felt cheap---reminiscent of a 3-star hotel rather than a premium Hilton brand. Slippers, shavers, and dental kits were subpar, and many items were not fully stocked and had to be requested. The shower layout and furniture placement also felt incredibly awkward---not low standard, but certainly not high luxury.

3. Navigation & Resort Layout
The resort's signage is terrible. Conrad Bali is a sprawling property, but without constantly staring at the paper map given at check-in or stopping to ask staff for directions, it is incredibly easy to get lost. Clearer, more intuitive building signs are badly needed.

4. Food & Beverage: Hits and Misses
We booked a half-board package, which covered our dinners.
- Dinners (Good): The food quality at RIN and Eight Degrees South (EDS) was genuinely good. However, RIN had a massive oversight where they ran out of Salmon. For a flagship Japanese restaurant to not have its star ingredient available is a major inventory failure.
- Breakfast at SUKU (Poor): Breakfast was a major disappointment. It felt bare minimum, featuring hard pastries, very limited variety, and a heavy reliance on carbs and sweets. Had we stayed for a week, we would have been forced to eat breakfast outside the resort by day three.

5. Hidden Costs & Lack of Resort Activities
When you stay at a massive resort in the Nusa Dua/Tanjung Benoa area, you expect a robust schedule of complimentary in-house resort activities. Here, there are almost none. Beyond swimming, table tennis, a giant chess set, and walking, everything else is outsourced to third parties or comes with an extra fee.
It feels like the resort tries to "milk" you at every turn. Even on our half-board package, no drinks were included. If you want a simple bottle of water with your dinner, expect to be charged upwards of 100k++ IDR.

Final Verdict
Conrad Bali has the footprint of a luxury resort and a wonderful team of frontline staff, but the manage

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel but not for us
sample_comments.text:
We spent 7 days at Conrad in a swim up room. To list negatives: Beach average, location isolated, very expensive and everything was a charge, laundry expensive and average job, kids club not good, 200k per adult bike to hire for 5hrs i was quoted while other hotels theyre free, happy hour probably the worst I've come across - choice of 4 drinks 2 of which are arak and you have to buy 2 of the same for the discount, vibe in the afternoons non-existent due to lack of beach front bars/deals/music etc., hot pools, mossie central especially in the back japanese restaurant area, other patrons often rude but probably just due to culture differences - eg everytime we come back from the buffet we would have a story about someone yelling at staff or pushing in or just being obnoxious, facilities very minimal - huge hotel but just nothing really to do apart from swim or lay on a sunbed. I can go on.
Positives: Staff were lovely to us, grounds beautiful and meticulously maintained, most pools joined so you can explore, morning buffet was amazing and restaurants food was great though expensive. 
We had friends stay with us in a less premium room and they had a very different experience on check in, they almost wanted to leave due to rudeness from mgt. 
We would always leave the hotel and eat and hang out at others for better value which is not a good sign. Id say we made the most of our stay but not what I expected and wouldn't go again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Matthew,
On behalf of our entire team, we are truly apologetic for your experience and that you feel entirely let down by your stay. From other reviews it is clear that this is not the normal experience for our guests and I hope that we would have the opportunity of welcoming you back again when you next visit Bali, although perhaps the atmosphere is likely not to change much in terms of bars and music around the pool and near the beach as we aim to keep a calm and serene approach to the area, with many spaces for guests to relax and unwind while at the pool or overlooking the ocean. I will be following up with our team to determine what happened on arrival from your friends as this is unacceptable and needs to be addressed immediately.
Thank you for having shared your impressions of our team and their approach to our guests as well as the variety and quality of our breakfast buffet.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.text:
The ocean view from the room is very beautiful.

The breakfast menu at the restaurant on the first floor of the check-in building has a lot of variety, and almost all the food was delicious. However, compared to the breakfast, the dinner buffet at the same restaurant was somewhat disappointing in terms of variety and taste for the price. The restaurant available only for dinner by the beach has a wonderful view, and the seafood is also tasty.

The pool water is clean, and it's quiet, making it a great place for relaxation. The beach within the resort is also well maintained and clean.

However, if there are many people during check-in, the staff's response can be somewhat frustrating compared to the resort's reputation. Specifically, when I requested check-in in the morning and returned after a meal, the room assigned to me in the morning was not ready, so I had to wait about another hour. They said the room would be ready by 3 PM, so I went at that time, but I had to wait more than 30 minutes, and the staff told me to come back at 3 PM without checking the time, even though I had requested around 3:40 PM.

Although it is a five-star hotel, the water quality in the accommodation is not very clean, as the shower filter I brought got dirty within two days.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
We were staying to celebrate our wedding anniversary and had informed the hotel in advance. However, a birthday cake was mistakenly delivered to our room. We called the front desk and were told someone would get back to us, but no one did. Eventually, we went down ourselves, and a staff member apologized and said the correct cake would be brought to our dinner.

When we returned to our room after turndown service, the birthday cake was still there. It felt as though our special day had been overlooked. Is this really the standard of hospitality one should expect from Conrad?

At dinner, we were initially seated at the table farthest from the dinner show by a female staff member. When we politely asked if we could move to a different seat, she replied twice, "No, is this okay with you?"---a response that felt inflexible and dismissive. We were also disappointed to see that the earlier issue with the mistaken cake had not been communicated to the dining staff. The lack of follow-up and coordination added to our frustration.

Fortunately, another staff member later stepped in, changed our seats, and made sure the correct anniversary cake was delivered. We truly appreciated their thoughtfulness.

Overall, while there were several disappointing moments, other staff members were excellent. We are especially grateful to the kind lady at checkout and the attentive teams at breakfast and by the pool. Thank you for your warm hospitality.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Midori,
Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback about your recent stay with us. We're deeply sorry for the mistakes and inconvenience experienced, particularly with the mistaken birthday cake delivery and seating issues. We understand how important your wedding anniversary celebration was, and we fell short of meeting your expectations. We're taking your feedback seriously and will address the issues with our team. 
Thank you for highlighting both the positives and areas for improvement. We're committed to providing exceptional hospitality and will review our processes.
We hope to have another opportunity in future to welcome you back for a much better experience.
Best - Kevin

sample_comments.title: Conrad Bali
sample_comments.text: We had a fun time and nice stay at Conrad Bali. We booked the Suites room as we are traveling with baby, so two queen beds with the kitchen pantry and vast living room area are plus points for us. There is also balcony. The hotel's services are great. They lent us microwave and baby chair in-room. One thing though, I requested for baby food (no salt no sugar) and Suku's chef helped but unfortunately not suitable for my baby's taste. Also fruits option for baby quite limited (only melon is suitable). Perhaps can add banana, orange, mango. There is no check-in / check-out counter at Suites, so it is also a bit inconvenient. Thankfully we still have time before airport. Also, while I feel it's good and convenient to have locals offering on water-sport but I've been approached many times each time I was at the beach or pool and I find it slightly distracting. Perhaps a more subtle sales approach would be better.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Indridewi,
Thank you for having chosen to stay with us at Conrad Suites during your recent holiday with family. I am glad you found the suite suitable and that our team took care of your needs; we will note to offer more alternatives to you in terms of fresh tropical fruit when you next return with baby. We will review with the water sports vendors to adopt a proper approach to our guests to ensure all feel comfortable.
We look forward to welcoming you back again to Conrad when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel one of my favourites.
sample_comments.positives: It was clean and spacious and never felt over crowded. We requested a later check out which they granted us an extra 1.5hrs. The staff are lovely and friendly. The RIN restaurant is probably the better restaurant out of the 3 located on site. Good gym facilities. Amazing front lobby absolutely beautiful. Felt very safe during our stay. Drank the ice and was fine. Great hotel!!
sample_comments.negatives: Half board menu is limited if you're staying 4+ nights. Gets a bit boring for food. A few dishes on the menu weren't served with the right ingredients listed on the menu. Found it strange we couldn't charge anything to our room. We also booked deluxe king room with pool view and definitely could not see the pool from our room. The staff had arranged flower decoration on our bed however it wasn't actually for us had some someone else's name on the bed "happy 30th Vincent" when we went and told the front desk they didn't care or offer to clean it up. there was a hair in my breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Ocean view what?!
sample_comments.text: The wedding in front of our room was super annoyin, the ocean view was far and covered by trees. Far away from the lobby. Expensive.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yorien,
We apologies the Conrad Ocean Suite you enjoyed was partially blocked by foliage. We will review with our gardening team to trim back as we do on a regular basis. Indeed the Conrad Suites are part of a separate area to the main resort and on our expansive 7 hectare resort, is perhaps the farthest point from the main lobby. We hope to find a more convenient location to suit your needs when you are next visiting Conrad.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Expected more from the Hilton brand (Conrad) - Disappointing Stay
sample_comments.positives:
Overall the hotels main lobby, pools and grounds are aesthetically pleasing but unfortunately that cannot make up for an overall disappointing stay. 
All the staff we encountered were excellent and displayed a high level of professionalism and were very friendly. That being said, the F&B team that handles the breakfast service need additional training ASAP and a complete overhaul of this area of their business.
sample_comments.negatives:
It appears the hotel priorities events and guests associated with events over the general population being accommodated. A large wedding party commenced on 11/10 which then led to absolute chaos at the breakfast service from that point on. Breakfast service on 12/10 & 13/10 was comical. From waiting to be seated, then eventually seated at filthy tables to staff dropping stacks of plates not once, not twice but three times!. No eggs, no bread and no cups left for diners in the middle / peak of their breakfast service. 

Stayed in room 2114, a ocean facing room which sounded fantastic during the booking process but left us disappointed. A Juliette balcony would be a better description of the ocean facing balcony, no chance of getting any chairs or tables on there to enjoy the view. Unfortunately the beach in front of the Conrad is also the worst kept in terms of other resorts / hotels around the area. A short walk or ride south will demonstrate what other hotels have done with their respective beach areas in front of their hotels and this will leave you further disappointed with the Conrad. 

Room cleaning was also odd. Would have the room service required light on from 0800hrs onwards as we would be out of the room but each day the room wasn't cleaned until we were back and getting ready to go out for sunset / evening. Room was normally cleaned (where we would have to vacate the room) post 1500hrs. We stayed at the Hyatt Sanur and also Anantara Seminyak this trip and the Conrad is far far below the standard of those 2 mentioned hotels yet it has the highest room rate. 

Also bicycles, why are you required to pay for this service? With the price of the room rate one would think the use of bicycles would be free like all the other hotels we have stayed at. 

Final word, wouldn't stay at the Conrad again and it has also put a dampener on potentially staying at other Hilton brand hotels around the world in the future.

sample_comments.title: Room Choice
sample_comments.text: we booked for sea-front room which was not avilable when we check-in which was disappointing. we were upgraded to suites and while it was ok, we missed a sea-facing room. btw sea-facing room is not as one may imagine it to be. so
sample_comments.response:
Dear Dharwatkar,
Sorry the room type you had expected was not available on arrival according to your view preference. For purposes of clarity to other potential guests, our ocean-facing rooms give directly to the ocean, located on the front-most part of each of our three resort wings. I am glad our team took the liberty to remedy the situation with a generous upgrade to a suite.
We hope the rest of your stay was to your expectation and that you would consider returning again on another opportunity.
Best,
Kevin

It's a family resort not made for a relaxing holiday or couples. It's pure family oriented, so make sure you are going for the right holiday purpose.
It's overpriced and very expensive for what it is. 
Restaurants are really pricy, so not convenient to dine in.

sample_comments.title: Some inconvenience here and there
sample_comments.text: So I stayed for a night only, before moving to uluwatu. At first, the hotel was great, the room was nice & clean, the staff were nice as well. However I found out they cannot accept gojek (online food delivery and stuff), and us as the guest have to go downhill all the way to their security post, which is quite far. Other hots such as The Mulia & Kempinski Apurva, they at least allow online food delivery to be placed at the receptionist. Plus I was having a severe diarrhea, and yet they didn't compensate my breakfast, which I asked to be brought to our room, which my husband will go to the breakfast room and pick some. Well I was quite disappointed.

sample_comments.title: A bit old, but service was awesome
sample_comments.text:
You get to feel the place is a bit old. That's why there are a lot of renovations going on. Their main pool was under renovation at the time so you feel like you're not getting all your money's worth. I would assume they could've given some discounts given the renovations but yeah. Our room was really not partial ocean because you can't see anything because of the metal walls for renovation. :( The curtains in our room are so old as well, you could see the dirt in them. :( 

But what they lacked in all of these they made up on superb service.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jimson,
Thank you for taking the time to post your comments on your recent stay here at Conrad Bali. It is truly appreciated. It is indeed the team that makes the Conrad Bali a very special place, and I am thrilled you have experienced great levels of service and engagement.
Please accept my unreserved apologies for the areas where we could have done better.
Once again thank you for sharing, we all look forward to welcome you back.

With regards,
Andreas Justkowiak 
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Luxury but have to pay for everything separately
sample_comments.text: I stayed at Conrad Bali for 4 nights for my honeymoon. We stayed in the ocean view apartment. Building, lagoon pools and ocean view were out of this world. Stay was good, but not quite value for money. Everything from breakfast to beach bale to laundry to airport transfer to even local phone calls are chargeable. I would expect at least some of these features to be bundled into the daily tariff, given we stayed 4 nights in an ocean view room. Room service is slow. Staff are polite but don't speak English too well. Check out and check in were slow. We checked in at 2pm and the staff didn't even escort us to the waiting lounge, they let us find our own way. Architecture of building is good, but personal touch is lacking.
sample_comments.positives: Proximity to beach, view from hotel room, architecture

sample_comments.positives: Nice and Beautiful Hotel in Bali

sample_comments.title: Relaxing comfortably
sample_comments.text: Typical Conrad finish and service standards. The welcome was warm and check in was speedy. Pools and beachfront are amazing and lots to do for all ages. Spa is expensive for Asia but ok. Location is 20 mins from Kuta and 90 mins to Ubud. Breakfast offer was excellent, plenty of choice and good service. Pool bar and restaurant offered great lunch with good service. Dinner in the beach located Bales is romantic and is worth doing as long as you don't expect to be wowed by the food which is basic and needs developing. No in roomWifi needs addressing. Everyday people complaining about this and a shame reception had to continually deal with the same complaint. The only negatives of a great stay.
sample_comments.positives: Location, pools and facilities

sample_comments.title: Nice looking hotel, but service should be better
sample_comments.text: The hotel is huge, and we got lost quite a few times, trying to go from one place to another. One day the beach was dirty, but after that it was cleaned up. I don't understand why there were so many ants in our room. We stay there in large group, taking a lot of rooms. There were complains for the inconsistencies between one room to another. Some smaller, some with older amenities (such as small CRT TV). The hotel was also ill prepared our our arrival, and spread our group all over their 4 wings (this is why we got lost most of the time). The level of service they provide does not reflect their 5 star rating, or justify their price. The GM should be training his staff better than that. Mind you, we were not the only ones complaining that day, there were a few japanese tourists also complaining.

sample_comments.title: Great Pool Villa Stay, but Service Communication Fell Short of Conrad Standards
sample_comments.text:
We stayed for three nights in a Pool Villa and overall had a very pleasant and relaxing experience. The villa itself was spacious, private, and beautifully maintained, making it a great choice for families with young children. The resort grounds were also stunning, and we truly enjoyed the tropical atmosphere. 

That said, we felt that the service did not fully meet the expectations we had for a well-known five-star brand like Conrad Bali. 

One recurring issue was communication. Several staff members seemed to have difficulty understanding English, which led to repeated misunderstandings. For example, when we asked at the breakfast venue about food options suitable for our 1.5-year-old child, we were repeatedly redirected to room dining or told about takeaway boxes, despite clearly explaining that we were asking about simple items to be prepared or arranged at the restaurant itself.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're delighted to hear you enjoyed the comfort and privacy of the Pool Villa, as well as the resort's tropical surroundings. We're truly sorry, however, for the communication challenges you encountered during your stay. This is not the level of clarity or service we strive for, and we appreciate you bringing it to our attention. Your comments have been shared with our team to help us improve. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a smoother and more seamless experience.

Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

sample_comments.title: Good resort for families and kids; plenty of activities available.
sample_comments.text: Good place to stay for families and kids, plenty of pools to use. However, the beach is not maintained and rubbish were present on the sand. We also were a bit uneasy as we don't know if some people were staff or contractors that works in the hotel as they wear different clothing. Plenty of activities to do and events at night time. The staff were amazing and kind.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Princess,
Thanks so much for your review! We're thrilled you and your family enjoyed the pools, activities, and our amazing team. We appreciate your feedback about the beach and uniforms---definitely something we'll look into. Hope to welcome you back soon!
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Pleasant stay, good service
sample_comments.text: Clean room, great room service twice a day, morning and afternoon, where they thoughtfully replaced extra bath towels, drew the curtains. Have the best fluffy pillows too. Love the indo food at Suku restaurant and their 6 types of sambal! Beach just outside is very peaceful to waddle around just after sunrise
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yi,
Thank you for your glowing description of your recent stay. From how our team took care of your room cleanliness and details to have they prepared food for you at Suku, they are the reason our guests continue to enjoy their stays each time: it all starts with them!
We look forward the opportunity of welcoming you back again when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Great hotel for a family with children
sample_comments.text:
Conrad has a multiple selection of activities for everyone, especially for the youngest guests. SPA was absolutely phenomenal. Good breakfast. 
Agoda sells "vacation packages" for selected rooms, however all what was included in the package was anyway complimentary for hotel guests. Don't be fooled by this.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Janusz,
I am glad to learn that the resort activities as well as spa experience were a highlight of your stay.
Thank you for your kind words and we all look forward to welcoming you back soon.
Best regards,
Evelyne

sample_comments.title: Excellent !
sample_comments.text: We stayed with 2 kids (3 and 6 years old) in dulexe garden view room, we got the corner room and it was amazing. The room is huge and spacious. The bed was very comfortable and spacious as well. We especially loved the amenities (mojave ghost from byredo) and you can request amenities for kids as well. My kids loved the monkey stuffed doll and the welcome cookies. Kids club and the pool was amazing. The water is still quite warm even in the evening. Beach was also clean. You can play water sports also. My kids spent wonderful time at the beach hunting crabs, star fish, and playing with the sand. Breakfast was good but can be better. They also have utensils for kids and kids corner on breakfast buffet so this is a very family friendly hotel. Excellent!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Lily,
We are grateful to have hosted you and family recently for a well-deserved holiday. Thank you for having shared your positive impressions and memories. Glad your children enjoyed the special Conrad monkeys as special keepsakes.
We look forward to welcoming you back when you are next visiting Bali!
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Pleasant but a little outdated
sample_comments.text: Conrad has been our fave, been coming to this hotel around 5x with the kids. Staff are helpful and nice as usual, however....some facilities need a little upgrading, the sliding door in bathroom was broken, left door could slide all the way to the other side , which was worrying as we have little kids. Also ... Across our room looked like abandoned villas that create a spooky ambiance in the evening, we couldnt swim pass 6pm (we had pool access room) ... but all in all we would still come back to conrad but perhaps with different room
sample_comments.response:
Dear christien,
We were delighted to have hosted you again as a loyal, multi-returning guest of ours. We appreciate your kind comments on our team's attention to you during your stay, and apologize you felt the room condition was not to standard. We will locate the room in which you stayed and ensure the elements you detailed are rectified as soon as possible.
We look forward to the opportunity of welcoming you back again to your home in Bali for what will surely be an improved stay experience.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Great hotel
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel, impressed with the room size
sample_comments.response:
Dear Toh,
Wonderful to have had you with us!
Thank you for having chosen to stay at Conrad Bali and we are delighted you were impressed with your stay.
We look forward to hosting you again when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Great Stay But..
sample_comments.text:
Our stay was enjoyable and the facilities were well maintained. However, some of the staffs were rude and seems to lack of experience. Local and foreigners treated differently. Like when we had our breakfast, the staffs treated foreign tourist who sit beside us nicely. But to us? meh. example: I ordered a cup of coffee and had to remind them 5 times (at the end i didn't get my coffee and left with a bad mood)

Please treat all of your guest the same :) thank you!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Salsabila,
We are terribly sorry you were left to feel as though treated differently than other guests. Our aim is to treat each guest individually, as they wish to be treated. We train our team to look to make genuine connections with each guest, and not make any assumptions as to expectations. Having to remind for coffee service five times is unacceptable and we share sincere apologies. We will be following up with our teams accordingly for improvement straight away and hope you understand your comments are greatly valued and will be put to immediate action for improvement. We hope to restore your confidence in our service and look forward to welcoming you back with us again for a better experience when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Giant older suites in a fabulous location
sample_comments.text:
The grounds of this hotel is amazing.. incredible for weddings and parties and holidaying. Very peaceful. 
Could do with a cool slide or two for kids, an upgrade in the suites to look more modern and aurconditioning in the main lobbys, buffets etc. 
Kids had a great time in the pool and we really enjoyed the space and breakfasts and meals. 
The staff that checked me in needed and overall the poor communication with waiters and misunderstanding over orders etc need focus for improved English skills. Aside from very very minor complications we had a great time!!!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Aruni,
Thank you for having chosen to stay with us and appreciate your kind and constructive comments. We will action accordingly with our team to ensure no gaps in communication when you next return with us. We hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back with us when you are next in Bali here at Conrad.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Family room
sample_comments.text: Connecting room and big balcony. Nice beach view and attractive water sport.
sample_comments.response:
It was a pleasure to have hosted you recently Surina, and pleased to see your experience delivered as you had expected. Our connecting king to twin beds (family room type) are extremely popular for families. We look forward to welcoming you back again when you are next in Bali for another relaxing holiday.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Nice place for family
sample_comments.text: Helpful staff, quick response .variety on breakfast with many options. Kids corner was cute. My son enjoyed eating in fish/crab plate & cup. My kids ate breakfast while feeding fish. I was looking for fish cup and one of the staff went all over to find the cup and gave it to us . Really appreciated. Thank you for sharing your positive impressions of your recent stay with us! We are thrilled you chose to stay at Conrad and are pleased to hear our team took great care of you, especially as your son enjoyed feeding the fish during breakfast time, always fun for many guests.
We hope to welcome you back again when you are next in Bali for another memorable holiday.
Best,
Kevin

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: So far so good

Thanks Christien! 
We were delighted to have hosted you recently.
Glad to hear all was to your expectation and hope to see you back again when you are next in Bali.
Best,

sample_comments.title: Value for money hotel in benoa
sample_comments.text:
(+) loving the newly renovated room it was nice and big and bright (compared to other old hotels in nusadua). The pool is big and the kids love the sand pool. Staff were nice and helpful. My sister washtafel was clogged at 2 AM and 3 staffs come right away to repair it. Breakfast was good. We also get free photo sessions with photographer which is very memorable for our family. Got many watersports right at the beach. 
(-) beach view is not so nice, the sea is on low tide in the evening so you can't swim in the sea. The food at in dining room and pool bar is too pricey. 

Overall it was a great stay with the value of money, thank you Conrad!

sample_comments.title: Disappointing unless you enjoy a queue
sample_comments.text: 40 + mins to check in. Told to have a seat outside (hot, humid, while wearing warm clothes having just got off a flight) as no room inside. Had to stand inside after 48 hours of travel and then we were queue jumped but a bunch of rude customers. No system for checkin. Breakfast again more queuing. Classic case of a greedy hotel not geared up for the peak Christmas season while renovating. If you turn one restaurant into a reception then you need to reduce your room availability. Spa also a massive disappointment- being renovated (like reception) so using suites only thing is walls are paper thin and the swimming pool is right next door - not relaxing. Rooms great, pool amazing and staff friendly - Christmas saved on this basis.

sample_comments.title: Standards have dropped, likewise, the price
sample_comments.text: The standards of this property as dropped since I last visited in 2015. One can find some summer flies (non-blood sucking types) in the room upon entering. They used to reach out to guests to help arrange for airport transfer but not this time. Would I still return, yes, pretty much because overall, the resort is clean and serene for a quiet weekend break.

sample_comments.title: Nice landscaping and layout but in need of renovation.
sample_comments.text:
The rooms with direct pool access would be nice had the pool itself was cleaner. Yes, much of the fallen leaves and debris were due to the windy and rainy weather but the water was murky and tasted salty. At least the main pool had clearer water. 
The hotel complex is walkable in the sense that you can easily walk just short distances from your rooms to the main restaurants, pools and the beach compared to other resorts that must resort to buggy rides to get to anywhere. 
The rooms require a timely renovation, which one wing of the complex is undergoing, as the wooden fixtures were showing their age. The most issue I had was with the confusing shower handle that took too much time to figure out. The showerhead's noozle was too small and the fittings were loosening up.

sample_comments.text: Well is a hotel for couple to come I can said

sample_comments.title: Lovely Service
sample_comments.text:
The hotel offered to help me with a birthday surprise for my bf by giving us a complimentary cake. And they emailed me a few times and called me before I departed for Bali. Very touched by their excellent service. 
Was disappointed with the hotel's renovation at the lobby which we were not informed when we booked the room but thankfully they gave us complimentary upgrade to a sea view room as a gesture of goodwill. 

Every staff there was welcoming and provide excellent service. I was injured by the corner of the bed frame and bled a little. Went to the reception and they immediately sent me to the hotel's doctor who gave me a dressing and some painkillers at no charge. 

The most awesome thing about the stay was the Departure Lounge which guests can use even after checking out of the hotel. There's hot shower (equipped with toiletries), towel and hairdryer on request. There are plenty of seats at the lounge, free coffee, tea and cookies as well as a pool table for use. And TV too of course!

Price is a little too steep but I guess that's normal for Nusa Dua.

sample_comments.title: Inifinity Chapel glazing for pre wedding shoot
sample_comments.text: wonderful Experience with a lovely beach, where u really can let go of the daily stuff and lay on the beach bed listening to the sound of waves and cooling breeze. It is near to the airport that cost 150k rup to Conrad and 100K back to airport. Taxi can be expensive since all day jam in the city. lots of tourist places have strict rules and often comes with a condition, money!!Especially for couple like us going for prewedding shoot, they charges us from 200k to 1 million rup depending on locations. Absolutely disgracing, just because we taking pre wedding shoot we paying more than 20 x the normal entry fee of ~ 10-20k. They will tried act very fierce and forced you to pay whatever the amount they put up. For us to travel there to take picture or video, we have to succumb to their demands. Wonderful venue for wedding shoot but let down by poor government management. Rent a car for a day to travel will be more cost efficient as lots of jam around the city and this will add to a high taxi fee. Bali will be a romantic place like Paris if only it make do away with all the exorting prices that tourist are subjected to. At least we found a great hotel that we can still relax upon even if we didn't go out.

sample_comments.title: A five-star hotel with professional staff, but overcrowded and lacking local character---unfortunately
sample_comments.positives: Once the reservation issue was acknowledged, the guest services team handled it professionally within a few hours, despite the hotel being fully booked. They kindly moved us to two different rooms during our stay---both were spacious and comfortable. The RIN restaurant was peaceful and enjoyable. The beach was fun for walking out during low tide, especially for kids. The property itself has all the expected features of a five-star resort.
sample_comments.negatives: Our reservation experience was disappointing. Although we had clearly communicated we were a family of four and requested a pool-access room, we were initially given a small room in an isolated corner with a construction view---even though we had paid for an upgrade. The hotel was extremely crowded, especially at breakfast, with long queues and a loud atmosphere. It felt more like an American resort than a local Balinese experience, with very little cultural touch. Unfortunately, the overall vibe was too busy for us, and we wouldn't choose this hotel again.

The staff was very friendly and welcoming, always willing to help, however some staff members had some language communication difficulties, which made it difficult sometimes to understand our requests etc...
sample_comments.negatives:
The pool villa definitely needs an upgrade, the furniture is very old and the room has a very unpleasant smell of old musty wood. 

The AC had some issues to control and adjust the temperature and the housekeeping team tried solving it couple of times, but the controls were not easy to setup as it's an old AC system apparently.

The private pool in the villa was not clean and it shows that it doesn't get cleaned regularly, which was very disappointing considering that the pool villa is one of the most expensive and has the highest room rate in the hotel, so you would expect it to be in top notch condition. 

Would recommend having a lagoon access room instead, if you're willing to have pool access all day as other guests were very pleased with it.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful stay. Bad check-in experience
sample_comments.positives: The location, beach front property, rooms and swimming pool
sample_comments.negatives:
The check-in experience. My check-in experience with Dewi was very disappointing. Upon check-in, she informed me that my room was a garden-view room. I asked her if I can see the ocean from that room, she said "you can only see the garden." So I asked her if I could upgrade my room to an ocean view room. She said she will check. I also checked on booking.com if ocean-view rooms were available and they were available. No where on booking.com it says that only a few or only one room left, which means there should be more than a few ocean view rooms left. Dewi came back and said that there were no ocean view rooms left and that the reservation department have forgotten to update the rooms availability on booking.com. How can a hotel with a highly reputable management (Conrad/Hilton) fail to update their rooms availability to real-time with their third-party reservations? 
Fortunately, when I entered my room, the view was garden and ocean (please see photo). I was very happy. But why did Dewi said that I can only see the garden? Why didn't she know the hotel room types which caused me unnecessary disappointment?

sample_comments.title: Excellent!
sample_comments.text: My stay at Conrad Bali is excellent! The Infinity Chapel view was beautiful. The environment in Conrad Bali was tranquil and offered a great moment for relaxation. There was a check-out lounge supplied with bathrooms and coffee & snacks. Guests who had checked out but whose departure time was not due could use the lounge. Staff were friendly and always greeted us with smiles!
